classifications.phrase: sharp rise in unemployment is occurring
scaled back the size and frequency of bond purchases
prepared to scale-up these purchases again
output falls by around 10 per cent
unemployment rate peaks at around 10 per cent
inflation remains below 2 per cent over the next few years
expected to turn negative temporarily in the June quarter
will not increase the cash rate target until progress is being made towards full employment
confident that inflation will be sustainably within the 2–3 per cent target band

payload.rationale: The statement signals a dovish stance overall, maintaining accommodative policy settings while acknowledging severe economic contraction and elevated unemployment, with inflation expected to remain subdued.
